evals.prompt: Save this idea in docs/ideas: a voice journaling app that turns daily reflections into weekly summaries.
evals.expected_output: A new markdown file under docs/ideas with the standard front matter and idea brief template filled in.

evals.prompt: Create an active idea brief for a finance copilot that compares vendor quotes. Use parent idea-00010-vendor-ops.
evals.expected_output: A new markdown file under docs/ideas with status active, parent idea-00010-vendor-ops, and the standard template filled in.

evals.prompt: write this up in docs/ideas: sms waitlist concierge for independent restaurants
evals.expected_output: A concise idea brief saved under docs/ideas even though the prompt is informal.
